title: 国服公测版本平衡性调整分析
summary: 哈喽大家我是lala，伊瑟公测在即，全新异格者技能调整已经公布，lala来带大家一起分析一下全新调整～————————————异格者赫尔基德本次调整增加了赫尔基德的输出能力和生存能力，帷幕效果消失时的拉条也提升了一些辅助能力，总得来讲是一次不错的优化。PVE方面更加适合开荒，也能够在需要生存位的副本
content_json: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"vxk7okQ99O94Losn","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_5000/h_2822/50364/878729/2025/8/24/172310.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"5000px","height":"2822px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"哈喽大家我是lala，伊瑟公测在即，全新异格者技能调整已经公布，lala来带大家一起分析一下全新调整～"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"————————————"}]},{"type":"header3","children":[{"text":"异格者"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"赫尔基德","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"4n5cpAnqe3h7DHZN","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_827/50364/878729/2025/8/24/795959.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"827px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"本次调整增加了赫尔基德的输出能力和生存能力，帷幕效果消失时的拉条也提升了一些辅助能力，总得来讲是一次不错的优化。PVE方面更加适合开荒，也能够在需要生存位的副本就业；PVP在帷幕被驱散时也不再疲乏。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"荼蘼","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"3rfB3ao5HyGLS4ZE","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_418/50364/878729/2025/8/24/884607.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"418px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"本次调整使荼蘼的出伤更加稳定，解决了刃心花有概率缺失的痛点，可以放弃效果命中转去叠加更多输出相关词条，无论PVE还是PVP都有所提升。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"月夜见","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"2Wq6XSc7o0nEdRV2","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_596/50364/878729/2025/8/24/816609.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"596px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"仅修改技能描述"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"博尔涅","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"8mZ5sSEOwlkui8PM","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1262/h_761/50364/878729/2025/8/24/934292.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1262px","height":"761px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"博尔涅作为PVE无就业的PVP异格者，调整前的PVP强度不算太高，此次调整使其强度有所上升。但不依旧推荐前期培养，在PVP需要时培养即可。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"夏妲","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"tljIhCeKvrhOcAIJ","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_853/50364/878729/2025/8/24/951705.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"853px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"优化了夏妲的生存能力，让夏妲有了一定在PVP发挥的可能，PVE也会有一些提升"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"拿鹤","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"lm5qQLEnfBwxjcmd","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_1343/50364/878729/2025/8/24/301739.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"1343px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"小技能增加一回合冰冻，终结技改为两段伤害间接提升概率，可以解放一个右位效果命中转去携带生命值百分比或效果抵抗，如果AI判定可以调整一下，PVP表现会更好。目前可以在PVP作为控制位使用，PVE处境依旧尴尬。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"宁芙涅","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"w5UZPYQXCYSvAupZ","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_543/50364/878729/2025/8/24/439694.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"543px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"新增净化debuff效果，PVP和PVE都有所提升，PVP可以跻身T0生存辅助行列"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"莉莉斯","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"7T4xX1AG39Ip1sx9","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1262/h_1205/50364/878729/2025/8/24/717722.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1262px","height":"1205px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"淑女的谢幕效果新增附加伤害，PVE提升不大，但PVP输出能力明显提高，可能会从肉队插件转为常驻输出加控制"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"席琳丝","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"Xylfj5wS7JN59I9H","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1263/h_1075/50364/878729/2025/8/24/936358.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1263px","height":"1075px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"新增开局护盾，可以作为快攻队的策略卡上阵，终结技的攻击下降转为暴击下降也可以很好的保护队友，PVP强度大幅提升，PVE强度有上升但不多"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"郝妍","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"Sbwc0wRERk6X3HRH","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_487/50364/878729/2025/8/24/69440.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"487px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能倍率大幅提升，但属性短板在PVE限制较多，且有更好的上位替代；PVP环境提升不错，不推荐前期培养"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"夜离","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"bF0BaRSZGQvrWmXa","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1263/h_412/50364/878729/2025/8/24/780653.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1263px","height":"412px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"数值和偷取增益的概率都有所上升，但数值提升不大，PVP强度不会有太大的变动，PVE强度会更加稳定"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"勉","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"TK3XvZG7kheyeTXy","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_524/50364/878729/2025/8/24/519435.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"524px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础面板提升，算是回到了正常水平，依旧不推荐培养"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"妮璐","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"1Z5aviPVKCPcnKgu","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_306/50364/878729/2025/8/24/773675.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"306px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础速度提升，PVP抢一速更加方便"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"维克托","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"ODpJDqhjZoQ9uBEB","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_433/50364/878729/2025/8/24/443681.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"433px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"被动伤害增伤效果提升，强度回温但不多，但还是不推荐培养"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴走武豪·阿凛","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"oajCZ7XMyaGzconn","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_504/50364/878729/2025/8/24/429329.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"504px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"嘲讽概率上升，PVE前中期抗压能力增加，PVP可以兼顾控制和护盾效果，在没有好的生存位时可以培养"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"百炼武豪·阿凛","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"UKmCBE0RHXdIPzUl","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_526/50364/878729/2025/8/24/45862.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"526px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"数值全面上升，但提升不多，估计强度不会有太大变化"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"风间一宵","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"PtUFIljR35jgGz3W","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_853/50364/878729/2025/8/24/81625.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"853px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"一速压制能力大幅增加，PVE提升不大，PVP强度有所上升"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"酣梦一宵","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"tpTBSfr6NW6wNJce","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_804/50364/878729/2025/8/24/321235.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"804px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"本次调整唯一削弱的异格者，PVP先手压制能力大幅下降；对PVE的多琪副本就业也会有一些影响，但影响不算太大依旧可用"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"RC-77","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"pUdYDAuy1qffrsjf","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_341/50364/878729/2025/8/24/515971.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"341px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"技能冷却缩短，但就业本就不多，强度没有太大变化"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"————————————"}]},{"type":"header3","children":[{"text":"智壳"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"天角兽","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"ZFCCxu48Y8FYpYAi","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1263/h_413/50364/878729/2025/8/24/806422.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1263px","height":"413px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"驱散数量增加，更加适合在PVP中敌人减益较多的阵容作为对策使用"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"白獠武者","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"OkhLdJyAWubvTp9M","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1262/h_400/50364/878729/2025/8/24/245546.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1262px","height":"400px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"暴击伤害的单次数值、总量上升，缩短暖机时间"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"万圣节","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"dVEX7cFJqvS4Ay0g","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_335/50364/878729/2025/8/24/718766.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"335px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"减少技能冷却更加稳定，长线战斗中更加适配技能冷却较长的异格者"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"万魔法典","bold":true},{"type":"image","key":"2NVJ18iNK9TjZtvJ","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1264/h_690/50364/878729/2025/8/24/222076.jpg","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"1264px","height":"690px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"增加触发效果的技能的冷却，使万魔法典不再适配长线战斗"}]}]

hot_content_strategies.name: 伊瑟！全角色！节奏榜！持续更新！
Re:从零开始的异格者生活（自建开荒入门攻略）
